rows.label: xs33680100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Oh, it's you.
I'm glad you're safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33680100_MSG0020
rows.name: If I at least had a Doll, I could have moved, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33680100_MSG0030
rows.name:
in this situation, there was almost nothing
I could do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33680100_MSG0040
rows.name:
It's an eerie place, but[ST:wide ]—
You're going to head back to where he is, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33680100_MSG0050
rows.name: Yeah, I'll go too, of course.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33680100_MSG0060
rows.name:
Someone is waiting for my return too.
I'll do whatever it takes to make it back alive.[ST:wait ]
